command: fabio connection create --name "MyADLS" --connectivity-type ShareableCloud --connection-type "AzureDataLakeStorage" --parameters '{"url": "https://mystorageaccount.dfs.core.windows.net"}' --credential-type Key --privacy-level Organizational
description: Create a Fabric connection. Parameters are provided as a JSON object (auto-converted to array format for the API).
notes: Parameters format: user provides {"key": "value"} → CLI converts to [{"dataType": "Text", "name": "key", "value": "value"}]. Connectivity types: ShareableCloud, OnPremises, VirtualNetworkGateway, PersonalCloud. Credential types: Basic, OAuth2, Key, Anonymous, ServicePrincipal, WorkspaceIdentity. Use 'fabio connection list-supported-types' to see all available connection types.

query_examples.description: Connection ID (used by shortcuts, data sources).
